salesforceEnvelopeTemplate.name: Sub-Supplier Terms of Use
salesforceEnvelopeTemplate.emailSubject: Pixid VMS Terms – {!Account.Name} – sent via Docusign for signing
salesforceEnvelopeTemplate.emailMessage:
Dear Madam/Sir,

We are pleased to send you the Terms & Conditions for the use of Pixid VMS.

To onboard you as a sub-supplier, you shall sign these Terms & Conditions before accessing the Pixid VMS platform.

Should you have any questions, please let us know.

[[Data:SenderName]]

documents.name: 2026 01 Pixid VMS Contract - UK_with SUB-SUPPLIER - vClean.pdf
